description: JustHodl Stress Index (JSI) — unified stress gauge: FRED 1990 spine (VIX/NFCI/KCFSI/FSI/curve/OAS z-scored on own history) + 12 live stress-feed overlay. Publishes data/jsi.json + data/jsi-history.json with percentile-since-1990 and crisis markers.

schedule.description: JSI refresh every 6h — FRED spine + live overlay + historical percentile
